creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Trying to build the port on an otherwise up to date system fails.
	It hangs here:

	checking whether cc accepts -g... (cached) yes
	checking how to run the C preprocessor... cpp
	checking if C preprocessor likes IDL... yes
	checking if C preprocessor can read from stdin... yes
	checking how to ignore standard include path...

How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to build the port on amd64 -current
